subject: docs(claude): add App Icons from SVG Source to Suggested Implementations
body:
Adds reusable reference pattern for SVG-to-PNG icon generation using Sharp.
Covers file structure, generator script, SVG design rules for maskable icons,
PWA manifest icon configuration, and Expo config guidance.

Tags: documentation, icons, pwa, svg
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: developer-docs
Semver: patch
